description: Exact symbolic mathematics using SymPy and SageMath. Covers algebraic derivation, equation simplification, symbolic integration, and exact solving.
use_cases: Solve a polynomial exactly over the rationals
Find the general term of a sequence
exclusions: Numerical approximation when exact answer is needed
Optimization under constraints (use CVXPY or Z3)
example_prompts: Find the roots of x^5 - x^3 + 2x - 1
